name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Shield your eyes in style with our premium UV400 polarized lenses. Crafted with ultra-lightweight TR90 frames, these sunglasses block 100% of harmful UVA and UVB rays. Perfect for beach days, pool parties, or any sun-soaked adventure. The wrap-around design ensures full coverage while the anti-glare coating keeps your vision crystal clear.

name: Floral Maxi Dress
description: Flow through summer in this stunning floral maxi dress. Made from 100% breathable TENCEL fabric that keeps you cool even on the hottest days. The adjustable spaghetti straps and smocked bodice provide a perfect fit for all body types. Hand-wash friendly with vibrant prints that won't fade.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Spray
description: The ultimate beach companion — our lightweight SPF 50 mineral sunscreen spray goes on clear, dries instantly, and provides 8-hour broad-spectrum protection. Reef-safe formula is gentle on sensitive skin. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes. Non-greasy finish means you can apply over makeup. Dermatologist-tested and hypoallergenic.

name: Inflatable Beach Float
description: Make a splash with this oversized flamingo beach float! Built from premium 0.4mm PVC that resists punctures and UV fading. The extra-wide lounging surface fits adults of all sizes comfortably. Inflates in under 2 minutes with the included pump. Bright, Instagram-worthy colors guaranteed to turn heads at any pool or beach.

name: Straw Wide-Brim Hat
description: Channel classic coastal elegance with this handwoven natural straw hat. The generous 4-inch brim provides exceptional shade coverage for your face, neck, and shoulders. Adjustable inner band ensures a secure fit even in a beach breeze. Packable design bounces back to shape after travel. Pairs perfectly with any summer outfit.

name: Waterproof Beach Bag
description: Stop worrying about sand and water ruining your belongings. This XL tote is made from military-grade waterproof canvas with welded seams. Features a zip-close main compartment, insulated inner pocket (keeps drinks cold for 6 hours), and a separate wet/dry pocket. Reinforced handles support up to 30kg. Machine washable.

name: Linen Shorts Set
description: Stay effortlessly cool in our premium linen co-ord shorts set. Crafted from 55% linen / 45% cotton blend for superior breathability and a luxe feel. The relaxed-fit shirt features coconut shell buttons and a camp collar. Elastic waistband shorts offer all-day comfort. Available in 5 summer-ready colors.

name: Aloe Vera After-Sun Gel
description: Soothe, cool, and repair sun-stressed skin with our 99% pure aloe vera gel. Enhanced with vitamin E and green tea extract to fight free radicals and promote skin regeneration. The fast-absorbing, non-sticky formula provides instant relief from sunburn. Fragrance-free and safe for the whole family. Keep refrigerated for extra cooling effect.
